intent: We are not building the Forge Agent architecture. We are building a Mac Consensus Deve Agent that will use consensus AI to develop high quality software. Use all the documents in the local repo to determine the architecture.
scope_statement:
Build the complete Mac Consensus Dev Agent — a native macOS two-process application consisting of a Swift/SwiftUI shell (UI, Touch ID authentication, Keychain secret storage, XPC communication, process management per TRD-1) and a Python 3.12 backend (ConsensusEngine with parallel Claude+GPT-4o generation and Claude arbitration per TRD-2, 8-stage BuildPipeline with 3-pass review per TRD-3, multi-agent coordination via BuildLedger per TRD-4, GitHubTool integration per TRD-5, HolisticReview per TRD-6, TRD development workflow per TRD-7, DocumentStore with FAISS vector retrieval per TRD-10, and backend startup/shutdown per TRD-12), connected via an authenticated Unix socket with line-delimited JSON and nonce-based handshake (TRD-1 Section 6), with Mac CI runner infrastructure (TRD-9), UI/UX design system (TRD-8), and all security controls mandated by TRD-11. This is NOT a Forge platform build — this is the autonomous coding agent product specified across all 12 TRDs in forge-docs/, which uses consensus AI (two LLM providers generating in parallel with Claude arbitrating) to develop high-quality software through an operator-gated, directed build pipeline.

Clarifications:
  - review the full TRDs to determine the detailed information.

prd_plan.title: Swift Shell Application Foundation and Module Architecture
Swift Authentication, Session Lifecycle, and Keychain Secret Management
Authenticated Swift–Python IPC Channel and Message Protocol
Backend Process Runtime, Startup Handshake, Health Monitoring, and Shutdown
Settings, Onboarding, Migration, Localization, and Shell Observability
Swift UI/UX Design System, Navigation, Build Stream, and Native App Surfaces
Document Import, Validation, Preview, and Shell-to-Backend Document UX
Consensus Engine Core with Parallel Dual-LLM Generation and Claude Arbitration
DocumentStore: Parsing, Chunking, Embeddings, FAISS Retrieval, and Context Assembly
Build Pipeline Framework, ThreadState Persistence, and Stage Contracts
Pipeline Stages 1–4: Scope, PRD Planning, PRD Generation, and PR Planning
Pipeline Stages 5–8: Code Generation, Three-Pass Review, Test Loop, and CI Gate
GitHubTool Integration, Branching, PR Lifecycle, and Safe Repository Operations
BuildLedger Multi-Agent Coordination and Shared Build State
Holistic Review Workflow and Corrective Fix-PR Planning
TRD Development Workflow and Specification Authoring Support
Security Controls: Credentials, Context Integrity, Generated Code, and Audit Trail
Mac CI Runner Infrastructure, Workflows, and Swift Build Validation
Comprehensive Test Strategy, Coverage Targets, and End-to-End Validation
macOS Distribution Packaging, Bundled Python Runtime, Signing, Notarization, and Auto-Update

1.title: Bootstrap Swift package workspace and module target graph

2.title: Add shell logging subsystem definitions and diagnostics bootstrap

3.title: Add shell configuration constants and bundle identifiers

4.title: Implement shared shell state models and environment injection

5.title: Codify shell concurrency model with MainActor and background actors

6.title: Implement app entry point and scene foundation

7.title: Implement single-instance enforcement and startup coordination

8.title: Configure bundle resources and resource accessor layer

9.title: Add Hardened Runtime entitlements and privacy manifest

10.title: Implement native platform integrations: menu bar, Dock, and notifications

11.title: Add module boundary contract tests and architectural invariant enforcement
